name: Bellevue Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Bellevue Baptist Church in Owensboro, KY! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights.

name: Centre Court Club
description: Centre Court Club is a place to play pickleball in Owensboro, KY. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights.

The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, lights, food, locker rooms, water, and youth programming.

name: Yellow Creek Park
description: Yellow Creek Park is a place to play pickleball in Owensboro, KY. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
